title: Crevice Cleaning Brushes, Scrub Brush for Hard to Reach Small Space, Home Essentials, Cleaning Supplies, Cleaning Tools for Household Use, Bathroom, Shower, Kitchen, Window, Toilet (2, Black)
features: Quality Materials: Crevice cleaning brushes have sturdy plastic and stainless steel structure, PP handle, not easy to bend, hard bristles, not easy to deform and fall off, durable and sustainable.
Ergonomic Design: Non-slip ergonomic design handle, easy to grip, comfortable and labor-saving, protecting our hands.

Efficient Cleaning: With narrow head and front curved design, this scrub brush can easily enter gaps, cracks, corners and hard-to-reach areas, thick and long bristles can effectively remove dust, debris and dirt in small spaces.
Convenient Size: The crevice brush is small and portable, easy to store and transport. Suitable for home use and travel.
Easy Storage: The handle of the small brush has a small hole for easy hanging to dry and storage, saving space.

Multi-purpose Brush: Our cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning various surfaces such as sinks, window tracks, blinds, door tracks, faucets, cars, stoves, grout lines, basins, floors, keyboards, bathtubs, vents, drains, swimming pools, vehicles, furniture, boats, countertops, microwaves, coffee machines, shower door frames, fans, shoes, sneakers, ovens, washing machines, toilet tank floors, the seam between the toilet bottom and toilet lid, the gaps in carved furniture, outdoor brick seams, etc.
description: From the brand Cleangor Cleaning Brushes Cleaning brushes for difficult places to reach Previous page Cleangor is a professional cleaning brand dedicated to providing efficient, convenient and comfortable cleaning tools for your home. It had a flexible, thin body to fit into tight spaces and strong bristles to remove dirt effectively.
